upload.hero_title: Upload a PDF to create a new reference entry
upload.hero_text: Processing depends on your PDF extraction settings. Manual mode saves full text only; built-in LLM and pdffigx will also extract figures.
upload.source_mode_hint_file: Choose a local PDF file and ingest it with the current extraction settings.
upload.source_mode_hint_doi: Enter a DOI and the system will look for an Open Access PDF and import it automatically.
upload.drop_subtitle: or click to select a file
upload.doi_hint: The system will search Open Access sources first and import a downloadable PDF automatically.
upload.placeholder_title: Auto-generated from filename if left blank
upload.placeholder_tags: Separate with commas, e.g. review, stem-cell, atlasing
upload.mode_hint_default: Defaults to auto extraction; switch to manual to select figures yourself.
upload.mode_hint_manual_profile: Current profile is manual: figures won't be extracted automatically, but full text will be saved on upload.
upload.mode_hint_builtin_ready: Defaults to auto extraction; the built-in AI will detect figure coordinates and save full text.
upload.mode_hint_builtin_not_ready: Built-in AI extraction is selected but the model or API Key is not configured. Only manual mode is available; full text will still be saved.
upload.mode_hint_browser_text: Defaults to auto extraction. Figures and full text will be extracted automatically.
upload.mode_hint_not_configured: Auto extraction is not configured. Only manual mode is available. Full text will be saved on upload.
upload.err_load_extractor: Failed to load extraction settings. Only manual mode is available.
upload.result_processing_text: Full text, regions and extracted figures will appear here once processing is complete.
upload.result_failed_text: Extraction did not complete successfully. Check the library for error details.
upload.result_completed_no_fig_title: Reference saved, add figures as needed
upload.result_completed_no_fig_text: You can open the manual extraction page at any time to add figures.
upload.result_empty_text: Upload result is saved, but no figures have been extracted.
upload.sync_extracting_text: Extracting full text; it will be saved automatically.
upload.sync_no_text: No usable full text found in the PDF
upload.sync_figure_rendering: Rendering PDF pages and detecting figures with built-in AI.
upload.sync_figure_page: Built-in AI is scanning page {0} / {1} for figures.
upload.sync_figure_none: Built-in AI scanning complete, but no main figures found. You can still add figures manually.
